news.title:
SAIL supplied indigenous special steel for INS Taragiri, boosting India's defence sector.
The stealth frigate reflects India's strategic strength and confidence in domestic manufacturing.
news.summary:
SAIL supplied indigenous special steel for INS Taragiri, boosting India's defence sector.
The stealth frigate reflects India's strategic strength and confidence in domestic manufacturing.

news.title:
Strong order pipeline boosts outlook for shipbuilders like MDL, GRSE, and CSL.
Indian Navy's 21% defence spending share supports domestic shipyard growth.
news.summary:
Strong order pipeline boosts outlook for shipbuilders like MDL, GRSE, and CSL.

news.title:
Indian equities surged 1.5%+ on April 1; Nifty 50 rose 1.56%, Sensex up 1.65%.
Defence stocks like GRSE, Mazagon Dock, and Cochin Shipyard gained; PSU banks rallied.
news.summary:
Indian equities surged 1.5%+ on April 1; Nifty 50 rose 1.56%, Sensex up 1.65%.
Defence stocks like GRSE, Mazagon Dock, and Cochin Shipyard gained; PSU banks rallied.

news.title:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.
news.summary:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.

news.title:
GRSE, Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard shares surged up to 20% on April 1; GRSE reported record turnover of ₹6,400 crore in FY26.
Cochin Shipyard's inclusion in F&O from April 1 and Mazagon Dock's steady performance also boosted stock activity significantly.
news.summary:
GRSE, Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard shares surged up to 20% on April 1; GRSE reported record turnover of ₹6,400 crore in FY26.
Cochin Shipyard's inclusion in F&O from April 1 and Mazagon Dock's steady performance also boosted stock activity significantly.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders acquires 3.66 crore shares in Colombo Dockyard PLC.
With this acquisition, Mazagon Dock's stake in CDPLC rises to 51%.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders acquires 3.66 crore shares in Colombo Dockyard PLC.
With this acquisition, Mazagon Dock's stake in CDPLC rises to 51%.

news.title:
West Asia war boosts defence bets; key Indian stocks like BEL, HAL, and Mazagon Dock may benefit from rising military budgets.
BEL and HAL show strong growth with diverse portfolios; Solar Industries and Data Patterns expand globally and in niche markets.
news.summary:
West Asia war boosts defence bets; key Indian stocks like BEL, HAL, and Mazagon Dock may benefit from rising military budgets.
BEL and HAL show strong growth with diverse portfolios; Solar Industries and Data Patterns expand globally and in niche markets.

news.title:
India's Rs 70,000 crore shipbuilding push boosts domestic shipyards like Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard, and GRSE.
Mazagon Dock leads with Rs 23,758 crore order book, while Cochin Shipyard's Rs 23,000 crore backlog highlights robust commercial prospects.
news.summary:
India's Rs 70,000 crore shipbuilding push boosts domestic shipyards like Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard, and GRSE.
Mazagon Dock leads with Rs 23,758 crore order book, while Cochin Shipyard's Rs 23,000 crore backlog highlights robust commercial prospects.

news.title:
Nifty India Defence index fell 5% amid market sell-off; HAL hit 52-week low at ₹3,510.
Defence stocks, including GRSE, BDL, and Mazagon Dock, plunged 6-8%; profit booking weighs.
news.summary:

news.title:
Defence stocks like Mazagon Dock, MTAR Tech dropped up to 11% despite Iran-Israel war.
War's third week showed counterintuitive trends, failing to boost defence sector stocks.

news.title:
SCI signs contract with Mazagon Dock for green methanol dual fuel vessel under clean shipping efforts.
SCI shares rose 2% to ₹242.55, Mazagon Dock gained 4.5%, following the announcement of this green initiative.
news.summary:
SCI signs contract with Mazagon Dock for green methanol dual fuel vessel under clean shipping efforts.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock announces SCI contract for 3000 DWT Methanol Dual Fuel PSV.
The vessel aligns with National Green Hydrogen Mission, using green methanol.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock announces SCI contract for 3000 DWT Methanol Dual Fuel PSV.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Ltd saw a notable surge in futures open interest on March 12.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders awaits final approval for a major submarine contract, potentially worth Rs 1 lakh crore, exceeding its current backlog.
The stock trades at 40x earnings, driven by future earnings duration; delays in contract awards could impact valuation and growth outlook.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders awaits final approval for a major submarine contract, potentially worth Rs 1 lakh crore, exceeding its current backlog.
The stock trades at 40x earnings, driven by future earnings duration; delays in contract awards could impact valuation and growth outlook.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders hosted an investor presentation highlighting achievements, including delivery of 7 destroyers and 6 submarines since 2017.
MDL signed MoUs for submarine programs and collaborations, showcased dividend distribution, and emphasized 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' through defense initiatives.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders hosted an investor presentation highlighting achievements, including delivery of 7 destroyers and 6 submarines since 2017.
MDL signed MoUs for submarine programs and collaborations, showcased dividend distribution, and emphasized 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' through defense initiatives.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock shares surged 18% in two days, trading 7.8% higher at ₹2,536.6, marking best week since May 2025.
Company clarified on ₹99,000 crore order, expects P75I submarine order by FY-end, boosting order book above ₹1 lakh crore.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock shares surged 18% in two days, trading 7.8% higher at ₹2,536.6, marking best week since May 2025.
Company clarified on ₹99,000 crore order, expects P75I submarine order by FY-end, boosting order book above ₹1 lakh crore.
